summary: Handheld footage of an ICE/ATF arrest in suburban Chicago in which a Laotian man is pulled from a vehicle. It opens on a close-up of a POLICE vest, and an officer narrates the subject's removal order and convictions. The footage is raw arrest footage with no music or stylized editing.
notable_text: Vests read POLICE, ATF/ICE; officer narrates final order of removal and criminal history
